dynamic_cluster_extractor._comment_peer_merge: === Peer merging: fonde bbox vicine in una sola più grande. 0=disabilitato ===
dynamic_cluster_extractor._comment_hysteresis: === Hysteresis: bbox flagged dynamic only after this many consecutive confirmed-dynamic frames ===
dynamic_cluster_extractor._comment_permanent: === Permanent state: lock track after N consecutive frames in same state (0 = disabled) ===
